scenario: presentationFor('website') — `website` has NO TYPE_PRESENTATION entry, so it renders via the generic fallback. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 / §3.4 (unknown type ⇒ generic renderer + `akm show <ref>`); src/core/type-presentation.ts (KNOWN_TYPES does NOT include 'website'); src/core/recognition-util.ts.
realWorldSource: src/sources/website-ingest.ts — snapshot pages; the `website` type value the adapter emits
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. FLAG (ambiguity): `website` is NOT in KNOWN_TYPES (the 14: skill/command/agent/knowledge/workflow/script/memory/env/secret/wiki/lesson/task/session/fact). presentationFor('website') therefore returns DEFAULT_PRESENTATION = {label:'Asset'}, renderer=null, generic action `akm show <ref>` (spec §3.4). Third-party/foreign types are never dropped — they stay searchable and render generically.

OPEN QUESTION for the adapter author: whether to ADD a `website` presentation entry (e.g. a read-only 'open the snapshot / visit the source URL' renderer) or accept the generic fallback. Recorded default: generic fallback. See the methodology doc.
